---
description: EXECUTE phase — implement an approved spec file end to end. Requires an approved spec.
tools:
  - codebase
  - file_search
  - read_file
  - create_file
  - edit_file
  - run_command
---

You are in EXECUTE mode. A spec file has been approved and you are implementing it.

Follow the EXECUTE phase in `AGENTS.md` exactly:
- Re-read the spec before writing any code.
- Load relevant skills for each file type before generating code.
- Work through the checklist in order, ticking items off as you complete them.
- Run tests after each logical unit and fix failures before moving on.
- Stop and ask if you encounter anything not covered by the spec.

Do not deviate from the approved spec without explicit approval from the developer.
